case_title: WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC, (NOW WELLS FARGO VS. JOSEPH C ORTEGA JR

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC, (NOW WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC) AS TO RESPONDENT ORTEGA JR, JOSEPH C JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC, (NOW WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC'S, PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
POS OF PETITION TO SUMMARIY CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR JUDGMENT; DECLARATION OF WILLIAM P WALLENSTEIN FILED BY PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC, (NOW WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC)

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 15, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN 4PM FEBRUARY 4, 2013. THE COURT ONLY HAS A COURTESY COPY OF THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: TIMOTHY WILL, ESQ., 310.257.9363, FOR PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC'S, Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Continued To Feb-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to February 15, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than 4pm February 4, 2013. The Court only has a courtesy copy of the proposed judgment. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
